title: VQLS
description: Variational Quantum Linear Solver — solves Ax = b using a hardware-efficient ansatz and three selectable cost-function methods (Hadamard-test with circuit output, classical-matrix, or global). Pauli decomposition uses the library's pauli_string_decomposition. Supported for arbitrary 2^n x 2^n matrices.

params.help: Cost function method. local_ht = Hadamard test circuits (outputs circuit diagrams, slow), local_classical = classical matrix evaluation (fast), global = 1 - |b.Ax|^2 (fastest).
params.name: cost_function

params.help: Number of ansatz layers. Each layer adds RY, RZ rotations on every qubit plus a CNOT ring. More layers = more expressive circuit.
params.name: n_layers

params.help: Maximum number of COBYLA optimization iterations. Larger values allow more precise convergence but take longer.
params.name: max_iterations
params.info: Please enter a positive integer, e.g. 200

params.help: Convergence tolerance for COBYLA optimization. The optimizer stops when the cost function change falls below this threshold.
params.name: tolerance
